steps.title: Understand the conditional probability
steps.content: The problem specifies we're selecting from days where there was no rain. We need to find: P(weekend | no rain) = (weekend days with no rain) / (all days with no rain).

steps.title: Extract values from the no-rain column
steps.content: From the table's No rain column: there were 16 weekend days with no rain, and a total of 64 days with no rain.
